summary: Completed testing of iteration 7 - Light theme redesign and branding changes from 'Orbit360 Engine' to 'מערך הבינה המלאכותית של אליאב צוף'. All backend regression tests passed (7/7). All frontend features verified working correctly with new light theme.
passed_tests: Regression: GET /api/folders returns 4 folders (torah, business, mental_snacks, general)
Regression: GET /api/content/items works - returns 5 items
Regression: GET /api/settings/marketing-dna works - returns default DNA settings
Regression: GET /api/backup/export works - returns backup with content_items and packages
Regression: GET /api/settings/ai works - returns AI provider settings
Regression: /manifest.json has updated name 'מערך הבינה המלאכותית של אליאב צוף'
Regression: /profile.jpg is accessible (HTTP 200, 95KB image)
Frontend: Dashboard loads with profile image visible (data-testid='profile-image')
Frontend: Dashboard shows 'אליאב צוף' text prominently in gradient heading
Frontend: Dashboard shows 'מערך הבינה המלאכותית של' subtitle
Frontend: All quick action buttons visible (YouTube, voice, trends, calendar, affiliates)
Frontend: Sidebar opens with profile image and 'מערך AI' title
Frontend: Calendar page loads correctly with Hebrew dates
Frontend: Trends page loads correctly with platform buttons
Frontend: AI Settings page loads correctly with provider options
Frontend: Digital Guides page loads correctly
Frontend: Affiliate Finder page loads correctly
Frontend: Settings page loads with DNA + backup section
Frontend: Light theme applied correctly - #F5F7FA background, white glass cards
Frontend: Header shows 'מערך AI — אליאב צוף' branding
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing test data from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 7 completed the light theme redesign. App renamed from 'Orbit360 Engine' to 'מערך הבינה המלאכותית של אליאב צוף'. Profile image at /profile.jpg. Light theme colors: #F5F7FA background, white glass cards with subtle shadows. All existing features (Calendar, Trends, AI Settings, Digital Guides, Affiliates, Settings with DNA+backup) continue to work. No authentication required.
